title: ericameria teretifolia
intro: Ericameria teretifolia, also known as the pine-sage or pine bush, is a shrubby plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ericameria teretifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
